tasks.title: Define Conversation Protocol
tasks.description: Design the internal Go structs for Messages, Roles, ToolCalls, and Events. This should be generic enough to map to OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini formats. Reference Vercel AI SDK patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Structs defined for Message, UserMessage, AssistantMessage, SystemMessage, ToolMessage.
Support for text parts, image parts, and tool call parts.
JSON serialization tags included.

tasks.title: Implement Configuration Manager
tasks.description: Create a robust configuration system to load user preferences, API keys, and model selections from a YAML file and environment variables.
acceptance_criteria: Load config from `~/.zotigo/config.yaml`.
Support environment variable overrides (e.g., ZOTIGO_OPENAI_KEY).
Auto-create default config template on first run when missing.
Getters for current provider and model.

tasks.title: Provider Interface & Registry
tasks.description: Define the `Provider` interface in Go. This interface should accept the Protocol structs and return a stream of Protocol events.
acceptance_criteria: Interface `Provider` defined with method `StreamChat(ctx, messages) (<-chan Event, error)`.
Factory pattern to instantiate providers based on string name.
Mock provider created for testing.

tasks.title: Implement OpenAI Provider
tasks.description: Implement the Provider interface for OpenAI's Chat Completions API.
acceptance_criteria: Map internal Protocol messages to OpenAI API JSON.
Stream response chunks back as internal Protocol events.
Handle function calling format conversion.

tasks.title: Agent Core Loop & Context Management
tasks.description: Implement the main loop that manages the conversation. It handles the 'Append User Msg -> Call Provider -> Handle Response -> (If Tool) Execute -> Loop' cycle.
acceptance_criteria: Context window management (trimming old messages if needed).
Automatic handling of tool execution results.
Middleware support for 'Human-in-the-loop' confirmation before tool execution.

tasks.title: Basic Tool Set (FS & Git)
tasks.description: Implement the core tools available to the agent.
acceptance_criteria: Read/Write file tools.
List directory tool.
Search tool (grep/ripgrep).
Git status/diff/commit tools.

tasks.title: TUI Implementation (Bubbletea)
tasks.description: Build the terminal user interface using Bubbletea.
acceptance_criteria: Chat input bubble.
Markdown rendering for assistant responses.
Streaming text updates.
Visual indication of tool usage (spinners, status lines).

tasks.title: Persistence Layer
tasks.description: Implement saving and loading conversation history to local disk (JSON/SQLite).
acceptance_criteria: Save chat transcript to `.zotigo/sessions/`.
Ability to load a past session by ID.
Auto-save after each turn.

tasks.title: Implement Anthropic Provider
tasks.description: Implement the Provider interface for Anthropic's Messages API.
acceptance_criteria: Map internal Protocol messages to Anthropic JSON.
Stream response chunks back as internal Protocol events.
Handle tool use format conversion.

tasks.title: Implement Gemini Provider
tasks.description: Implement the Provider interface for Google's Gemini API.
acceptance_criteria: Map internal Protocol messages to Gemini Go SDK or REST format.
Stream response chunks back as internal Protocol events.
